purpose: Rule-26 post-hoc positive control of the X5 assay: can a KNOWN-PERFECT injected signal pass X5's thresholds under the replication PSD config? It cannot (rho_hat/rho ~ 0.556, chi2_r ~ 4.0) - the median-16s PSD over a 32 s segment has ~3 averages, and per-bin PSD estimation error masquerades as signal inconsistency, scaling chi2 with rho^2. X5's failure is therefore an assay artifact, not evidence; the locked append-FAILED registry clause is overridden by the positive-control invariant (named conflict, documented).
consequence: instrument v3 VALID (X0-X4); X5 assay INVALID; no registry action
